title: Chain of Custody
tagline: Prove an entire document lineage: every version hash links to the parent, and one changed byte snaps the history.
holy_shit: From just the genesis hash, your browser can re-hash every custody link and prove the full history is intact — or name the exact link where tampering starts.
powered_by: runVerifiedCell() verifies the extract cell before execution, while crypto.subtle re-hashes every content node and parent pointer in a content-addressed custody chain
agent_scenario: When you need to prove the complete history of a document or artifact (not just current bytes): validate each version's hash and parent link from a trusted genesis hash, and fail loudly at the first broken hop.
author: kody-w + Copilot
